failures.criterion: Bug 2: Directory scan removes workspaces for issues removed from board
failures.evidence: The directory scan guard at server.ts:500 is `if (opts.paths && opts.repoManagerDeps?.listDir)`. In production, `repoManagerDeps` is never passed to `startServer()` in index.ts (zero references confirmed). The scan is dead code in production. Fix: fall back to `defaultDeps.listDir` when `opts.repoManagerDeps?.listDir` is undefined.

documentationFeedback: Issue body clearly describes both bugs with root cause and evidence. The 'one-line addition to serialization' description for Bug 1 was slightly misleading but the implementer documented the deviation.
observations: Bug 2 fix requires one-line change: use `opts.repoManagerDeps?.listDir ?? defaultDeps.listDir` in server.ts:500 instead of requiring repoManagerDeps to be injected
jj workspace forget omission for off-board workspaces is acceptable — repo is unknown for off-board workspaces
906/906 daemon tests pass; biome clean; tsc clean (pre-existing deprecation warning only)
